CustomField.description: How much of this peer's fulfillment chain is exposed when responding to a depth-charge probe. Off = refuse to reveal anything (audit chain stops here). OrgOnly = reveal this peer's own org identity but not any sub-vendors. OrgAndJurisdiction = reveal org + jurisdiction (country/state) — sufficient for most regulatory checks (ITAR / GDPR / state-licensed work). Full = reveal everything including downstream peers + per-user attribution. Defaults to Off so consent is opt-in per-peer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Default Off. Set to OrgOnly / OrgAndJurisdiction / Full to opt this peer into upstream depth-charge audits.
CustomField.label: Reveal Fulfillment Depth

value.label: Full (org + jurisdiction + downstream chain + user attribution)
